page_metadata.biotools__summary: Pooled CRISPR Inverse PCR sequencing (PCIP-seq) is a method that leverages selective cleavage of circularized DNA fragments carrying proviral DNA with a pool of CRISPR guide RNAs, followed by inverse long-range PCR and multiplexed sequencing on the Oxford Nanopore MinION platform.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Pooled CRISPR Inverse PCR sequencing (PCIP-seq) is a method that leverages selective cleavage of circularized DNA fragments carrying proviral DNA with a pool of CRISPR guide RNAs, followed by inverse long-range PCR and multiplexed sequencing on the Oxford Nanopore MinION platform.
